name: Lake & Shore RV Resort
summary_text: A large, family-focused RV resort near the Jersey Shore featuring wooded campsites, a swimming lake, water park, pool, boating, fishing, and easy access to Ocean City, Cape May, and Atlantic City.
address: 515 Corson Tavern Road, Ocean View, NJ 08230

amenities.campStore: Groceries, RV Supplies, Firewood and Ice

otherNotes: The resort contains a large number of seasonal campsites.
Transient campsites are more limited than the overall resort size may suggest.
Wooded sites provide good shade but conditions vary throughout the property.
Review individual site dimensions carefully when reserving a larger RV.

starlink.notes: Open sites may provide usable reception, while heavily wooded sites may have significant obstructions.

activities.boatingLaunch: Lake Access for Small Non-Motorized Boats

nearbyAttractions: Cape May County Park and Zoo

petNotes.walkingAreas: Wooded campground roads and internal walking areas provide several options for walking dogs.
petNotes.dogPark: A designated dog park is available.
petNotes.dogFriendlyTrails: Leashed pets can use campground walking areas and permitted nearby trails.
petNotes.petRestrictions: Pets must remain leashed outside the dog park. Beach restrictions vary by municipality and season.
petNotes.hazards: Check pets for ticks after walking through wooded or grassy areas. Hot pavement and sand can also be a concern during summer.
petNotes.notes: The shaded campground is generally comfortable for pets, but confirm seasonal beach rules before taking dogs to the shore.

hospital.name: Cooper University Hospital Cape Regional
hospital.address: 2 Stone Harbor Boulevard, Cape May Court House, NJ 08210

veterinarian.name: Shore Veterinarians - Seaville
veterinarian.address: 73 Hope Corson Road, Ocean View, NJ 08230

emergencyVeterinarian.name: Ocean View Veterinary Hospital
emergencyVeterinarian.address: 2033 US-9 North, Cape May Court House, NJ 08210

tripTips: Book early because many campsites are occupied by seasonal campers.
Confirm whether Wi-Fi and cable charges are included with your reservation.
Bring bicycles or a golf cart alternative because the resort is large.
Check seasonal pet rules before planning a beach day with your dog.
Plan at least one day for Ocean City or Cape May.
